title: Monsoon Trails — Idukki
route: Kochi → Thodupuzha → Mundakkayam → Kuttikanam → Vagamon → Kochi
summary: Two days of misty ghat roads, waterfalls in full flow, and hairpins wrapped in cloud. Our signature monsoon run through the Western Ghats — bring your rain gear and your patience for slow, slippery corners and some trail riding through the mud and puddles.
highlights: Misty ghat roads
Rainy waterfalls in full flow
trail riding through the mud and puddles
rsvpNote: Limited to 20 riders. Riding gear (helmet, jacket, raincoat) mandatory. Confirm on the WhatsApp group by July 25.
priceNote: Contribution: ₹2,000/rider (Fuel, Food not included). Pillion welcome.

title: Tawang Adventure 2026
route: Guwahati → Bomdila → Tawang → BumLa → Zeminthang → Jang → Mago → GokarLa → Tezpur → Guwahati
summary: An 11-day expedition into India's far northeast — from Guwahati into the mountains of Arunachal Pradesh, through Bomdila and Tawang to the high-altitude frontier at BumLa, then deeper into the remote villages of Zeminthang, Jang, Mago and GokarLa before looping back via Tezpur. One of our longest and most demanding rides yet.
highlights: BumLa Pass, on the India-China border
Tawang Monastery, one of the largest in India
Remote frontier villages: Zeminthang, Jang, Mago, GokarLa
1,624 km through Arunachal Pradesh in 11 days

title: Sundowner Circuit — Blore Edition
summary: A quick half-day loop out of Bengaluru — an early start from Hebbal, a clean run out to Pennukonda and back, and a full tank's worth of open road. No big itinerary, just a reminder of why we ride on weekends.
highlights: Open highway riding to Pennukonda and back
Offroad trails near windmills
A 250 km loop, done in a single morning

title: Nepal - Mustang 2025
route: Gorakhpur → Kathmandu → Pokhara → Marpha → Jomsom → Mukthinath → Pokhara → Gorakhpur
summary: 13 days across the Nepal Himalayas — from Gorakhpur into Kathmandu and Pokhara, then into the high-desert terrain of Mustang through Marpha and Jomsom, up to the sacred temple town of Muktinath, before the long ride back.
highlights: Kathmandu and Pokhara valleys
The high-desert landscapes of Marpha and Jomsom
Muktinath, one of the highest Vishnu shrines in the world
1,530 km across Nepal in 13 days

title: Ladakh - Zanskar Expedition 2024
route: Chandigarh → Jispa → Padum → Leh → Pangong → Hanle → UmlingLa → Tso Moriri → Nyoma → Leh → Kargil → Srinagar → Chandigarh
summary: Our most ambitious expedition yet — 21 days and nearly 3,000 km through Ladakh and the remote Zanskar valley. From Chandigarh through Jispa into Padum, on to Leh, the blue waters of Pangong and Tso Moriri, the high-altitude plateau of Hanle, and UmlingLa — the world's highest motorable pass — before looping back via Kargil and Srinagar.
highlights: UmlingLa, the world's highest motorable pass
The remote Zanskar valley via Padum
Pangong Tso and Tso Moriri, back to back
Hanle's high-altitude plateau

title: Spiti Valley Circuit
route: Delhi → Chandigarh → Narkanda → Chitkul → Kalpa → Tabo → Kaza → Losar → Chandra Taal → Sissu → Chandigarh
summary: 12 days through the cold desert of Spiti Valley — via Chitkul, India's last inhabited village toward the Indo-Tibet border, the thousand-year-old monastery at Tabo, and the high-altitude town of Kaza, before crossing over to the turquoise waters of Chandra Taal.
highlights: Chitkul, the last village toward the Indo-Tibet border
Losar, a remote and beautiful high-altitude village in Spiti Valley
Chotta Dhara, river crossing and off-road sections from Chandra Taal to Sissu
Kaza, Spiti's high-altitude headquarters

title: Ladakh Full Circuit 2022
route: Delhi → Ludhiana → Srinagar → Kargil → Leh → Nubra → Hunder → Pangong → Hanle → UmlingLa → Karu → Jispa → Manali → Kasol → Delhi
summary: The ride that started it all — 25 days and over 3,300 km through Ladakh via Srinagar and Kargil, into the sand dunes of Nubra and Hunder, along Pangong and Hanle to UmlingLa, and home via Manali and Kasol. The expedition that launched ALyf2Ride as a community.
highlights: Nubra Valley and the sand dunes at Hunder
Pangong Tso and the remote Hanle plateau
UmlingLa, the world's highest motorable pass
The expedition that officially launched ALyf2Ride
